BOMBA FIRE SAFETY CERTIFICATE

Issuing Authority: Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (JBPM), Shah Alam
Property Address: 12 Jalan Demo, Seksyen 7, 40000 Shah Alam, Selangor
Issued: 10 December 2025
Valid Until: 10 December 2027

This certificate confirms that the premises at the above address passed
fire-safety inspection on the date of issue. All fire-suppression systems,
emergency exits, and alarms meet Malaysian fire-safety code (UBBL 1984,
Part VII). Valid for two years from date of issue.

Certifying Officer: Ir. Haji Mohd Zaki bin Ismail
Stamp: JBPM Shah Alam Station
